items.title: What Makes AI Companies Worth Investing In Today
items.description: The AI investment climate has transformed. Venture capital now flows to companies with proven value, not promises. Two experts explain the new rules.

items.title: Taalas Launches Hardcore Chip With “Insane” AI Inference Performance
items.description: Taalas has launched an AI accelerator that puts the entire AI Model into silicon, delivering 1-2 orders of magnitude greater performance. Seriously.

items.title: Olympian Mikaela Shiffrin Just Made A Great Point About Online Criticism
items.description: Shiffrin makes a great point about whether criticism during competitions is warranted or justified, especially given her status.

items.title: Mckenna Grace Is Inescapable, Now With A Dozen Major IP Roles By 19
items.description: We talk about Pedro Pascal being omnipresent as of late on film and TV, but he’s got nothing on Mckenna Grace.

items.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Friday, February 20
items.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.
